subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The elegy composed for the passing of that pure Light, that embodied Spirit, that radiant Star of the Supreme Concourse, that resplendent Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مرثیه که در تعزیه نور مجرد روح مجسم کوکب لامع ملا اعلی آفتاب
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @praise and encouragement
